summary: Beautiful front‑of‑house recording of the Irvine weekend, featuring liquid Dark Star and soaring Gloria.
review: The reviewer raves about a flawless, peaceful crowd and a show that kept the energy flowing from start to finish. Highlights include a “liquid” Dark Star and an inspired Gloria, with Jerry’s fuzzy, lyrical lead work standing out. The FO​B audio is described as beautiful, with no technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises both performance and recording without any criticism, indicating an outstanding show and excellent FO​B audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the FO​B audio "beautiful"; no issues of muddiness or drop‑outs are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Calm, well‑balanced crowd energy with smooth transitions; the band maintained a relaxed yet engaging vibe throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Fuzzy, liquid lead tone praised as one of the show’s highlights.
